stat_definition: STS2.fun Necrobinder card table with Viewing Patch = Main v0.103 - current (38,727 runs), rarity/type = All, Separate upgrades off, Min. 5 offers on. pick_rate is Reward %, sample_size is Offered, win_rate is Win %, impact is Impact.
reviewer_notes: Captured with read-only browser inspection from the STS2.fun current-patch Necrobinder card table. STS2.fun does not provide card-specific URLs. Values are from the row table and selected-card detail panel; not All Patches.
